text:
1. Mongotune is the "Manager" (The Brain)
Mongotune is the sidecar process (agent) running next to the database 2 3 . It hosts a collection of Policies designed to
keep the database healthy. According to the "Mongotune Policies UX Doc," the Rate Limiters are explicitly listed as policies
within Mongotune 1 :
• Policy 1: Query Sentinel (Kills running queries) 4 .
• Policy 2: Adaptive Rate Limiter for Operations (The "Ingress" limiter for queries/writes) 5 .
• Policy 3: Adaptive TCMalloc Tuning (Memory) 6.
• Policy 4: Adaptive Cache Eviction (WiredTiger Cache) 7 .
• Policy 5: Adaptive Rate Limiter for Connections (The connection queue) 8 .
• Policy 6: Write-Blocking (Stops writes when disk is full) 9 .
